sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50021" key="i(erobota/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερο-βοτάνη</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n50021.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἱερὰ βοτάνη</ref> </xr> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βοτάνη</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Isid.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Etym.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.9.55</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
